name: gravitino-openapi-tooling
description: Lint and bundle tooling for the Gravitino OpenAPI spec under docs/open-api. Versions here are tracked by Dependabot/Renovate; the CI workflow (.github/workflows/openapi.yml) is the source of truth for spec validation.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:redocly && npm run lint:spectral
scripts.bundle: redocly bundle gravitino -o build/openapi.json && redocly bundle gravitino -o build/openapi.yaml
scripts.lint:v1: npm run lint:v1:redocly && npm run lint:v1:spectral
scripts.bundle:v1: redocly bundle ../../docs/open-api/v1/openapi.yaml -o build/v1/openapi.json && redocly bundle ../../docs/open-api/v1/openapi.yaml -o build/v1/openapi.yaml
scripts.codegen:v1: npm run bundle:v1 && npx --yes @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i build/v1/openapi.json -g rust -o generated/v1/rust && npx --yes @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i build/v1/openapi.json -g typescript-axios -o generated/v1/typescript
